title: Cache getSiteSettings + remove force-dynamic from layout to fix Neon compute burn

close_reason: Cached getSiteSettings via unstable_cache (1h TTL), removed force-dynamic from root layout, added revalidate=3600 to sitemap, revalidateTag on settings PUT. sitemap now prerenders static. Build passed. Pushed in 98831b5.

title: Fix middleware performance — cache agency lookups
description: src/middleware.ts makes an API call to /api/agencies on EVERY request (+100-300ms latency per pageload). Fix by caching agency config at the edge (Vercel KV, Redis, or cookies with TTL).
close_reason: Moot. Root cause was layout force-dynamic + getSiteSettings calls per render, not middleware. Fixed in commit 98831b5 by caching getSiteSettings with unstable_cache (1h TTL) and removing force-dynamic from root layout. Middleware already only hits DB on subdomain requests (not main domain), so current behavior is acceptable and caching there is unnecessary overhead.

session-2026-03-28-done-outreach-visibility: Fixed 3 bugs + built outreach management page. (1) social_media column was missing from DB - added via ALTER TABLE. (2) contact_email_2 (secondary email) added to DB, ListingForm UI, and PUT API. (3) Admin marking listing as claimed now auto-creates SMB user (if needed) and sends magic login link email to contact_email with portal access details. (4) Cron double-send bug fixed: Vercel Hobby 10s timeout caused emails to send via Resend but DB status never updated, so same campaigns kept getting resent. Fix: write status to DB BEFORE calling Resend (best-effort). (5) Bounced contact (Boer Brothers) cleared, duplicate peakseasonshvac campaign advanced to email_1_sent. (6) Built /dashboard/outreach page: stat cards (Queued/E1/E2/E3/Opens/Clicks), filter tabs by step, search, paginated table with last sent + opens + clicks per contact, per-row actions (skip/reset/complete/bounce), Send Now buttons (5/10/20) that trigger cron from UI. New /api/outreach GET+PATCH route. Outreach added to sidebar nav. OPEN: otk P1, aw8 P2, g75 P2, 5tp P2, 8yu P1.

Workaround: set up cron-job.org to call /api/cron/all?limit=5 4x daily (13/16/19/22 UTC) = 20/day. User upgrades to Vercel Pro next week for native fix. Yellow Dot HVAC (id=95, info@ydhvac.com) opened email + visited /biz/claim but did not complete - warm lead. Sentry error on /biz/claim is password manager extension noise, not a real bug. session-2026-04-20-done-neon-cache-emails-reactivation: Neon HTTP 402 quota outage. Root cause: layout.tsx force-dynamic + 2x getSiteSettings per render + uncached sitemap. Fixed with unstable_cache(1h) on getSiteSettings + revalidateTag on settings PUT + revalidate=3600 on sitemap + revalidatePath('/sitemap.xml') on listing mutations. ~95% DB query reduction. Neon upgraded Free->Launch ($19/mo, 300 compute hrs). Shipped: llms.txt dynamic route (ISR 1h) + robots.txt pointer. Rewrote all 8 SAAS Push + Marketing Services emails with A/B variants (16 total) — education-led, Triangle Hub->LNL AI Agency bridge, focus on AI agents (Real Estate PA/Home Services CSR/Busy SMB PA) + AEO/GEO/AI Overviews + GMB + 3-audit system (Trust/GBP/Tech SEO). Template fns now return {subject,preheader,html}. A/B via listing_id parity. Unsubscribe endpoint extended to cover saas+marketing+reactivation tables. NEW: cold reactivation sequence (4 emails A/B, migration 003, self-enqueueing cron, added to /api/cron/all). Fires 30 days after outreach email_4 for still-unclaimed. Email 1 offers free 10-point AI/local search audit for claiming. CRITICAL DEPLOY STEP: run npm run migrate or hit /api/migrate to create cold_reactivation_campaigns table. Commits: 98831b5 23a3731 03780ef 7de7ad0 + llms.txt. Open ready queue: 24y 4kr 8yu otk 5tp g75.

session-2026-03-19b-admin-login-fixed: Admin login on Vercel was broken because request.nextUrl.protocol is unreliable on Vercel (SSL terminates at edge, so it returns http: not https:). Fix: derive isSecure from NEXTAUTH_URL env var + x-forwarded-proto header in middleware.ts instead of request.nextUrl.protocol. When NEXTAUTH_URL=https://..., NextAuth sets __Secure-next-auth.session-token cookie, and getToken must use secureCookie:true to find it. This is now fixed in middleware.ts.

session-2026-03-19d-done-tracking-analytics: Fixed critical forceRun cascade bug (all 4 emails sent in one pass to 20 contacts - those are lost). Fix: forceRun only affects Email 1, Emails 2-4 always respect real intervals (7/14/21 days). Built open/click tracking via Resend webhooks: store messageId per email step, /api/webhooks/resend endpoint, opens+clicks columns on outreach_campaigns. Built email analytics dashboard on CRM page: KPI cards (open rate, click rate), per-step breakdown (Email 1-4), A/B variant comparison, 14-day activity chart. Fixed listings STATUS/ACTIVE confusion: added active BOOLEAN column (default TRUE), STATUS now shows Published/Unpublished, featured field now exclusively means highlighted at top of results, public pages filter WHERE active=TRUE. DB migrations run: outreach_campaigns add email_1-4_resend_id, opens, clicks, last_opened_at, last_clicked_at; listings add active BOOLEAN. RESEND WEBHOOK SETUP REQUIRED: user must add endpoint in Resend dashboard + RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var in Vercel. 8 contacts still pending Email 1. OPEN: 4eg (white-label emails P1), otk (image upload limits P1), aw8 (middleware perf P2), g75 (silent error swallowing P2)

session-2026-03-27b-done-crm-claims-contact: Fixed 3 major bugs + built CRM contact page. (1) Claims page showed all 343 listings as pending claims - root cause: claim_status defaulted to 'pending' on import. Fix: INNER JOIN users in claims API + ran DB UPDATE to clear 343 bad rows + changed migration default to NULL. (2) CRM metric cards showed 0 - root cause: WHERE l.claimed=false excluded NULL rows. Fix: changed all 4 queries to (claimed=FALSE OR claimed IS NULL) across crm/route.ts and crm/analytics/route.ts. (3) Added Number() coercion on opens/clicks. (4) Metric cards now clickable - click Opened Email to filter list to openers. (5) Built /dashboard/leads/contact?id=X - full CRM contact page: all fields visible, lead stage picker, recommended services highlighted amber, social media with icons, email sequence timeline, notes/calls/email log. Business names in CRM list now link to contact page. (6) Fixed support page email (support@trianglelocalhub.com -> directory@thetrianglehub.online), wired up contact form to /api/contact-support, added email to footer. (7) Bell notification system added to beads as smart-directory-nc-5tp P2. Test emails sent (Variant A + B) to lainiem@lnlcreatives.com via Resend - reply-to is directory@thetrianglehub.online.
